nasb.text: It came about at the end of three days after they had made a covenant with them, that they heard that they were neighbors and that they were living within their land.

esv.text: At the end of three days after they had made a covenant with them, they heard that they were their neighbors and that they lived among them.

cnv.text: 以色列人和他們立約之後，過了三天，才聽見他們是自己的近鄰，是住在這地的居民。

ccb.text: 立约三天后，以色列人才发现他们原来就住在附近。
